idea-plugin.name: ByteSip
idea-plugin.description:
ByteSip — Healthy Coding Reminders for Developers

Tired of coding for hours without a break? ByteSip is your friendly wellness companion that lives inside your IDE. It quietly reminds you to take care of yourself with witty, non-intrusive balloon notifications — so you can keep shipping code without sacrificing your health.

Features

  • Water reminders — every 25 minutes, because your kidneys deserve better than coffee.
  • Eye-rest reminders — every 50 minutes, following the 20-20-20 rule for healthier eyes.
  • Movement reminders — every 90 minutes, so your spine doesn't file a critical bug report.

Why ByteSip?

  • 🎈 Non-blocking notifications — appears as a balloon at the bottom of your IDE, never interrupts your flow.
  • 😄 Funny, motivating messages — randomly picked from a curated pool to keep things fresh.
  • ⏸️ Snooze or Done actions — quickly dismiss or postpone with a single click.
  • ⚙️ Zero configuration — install it and it just works. No setup required.
  • 🪶 Lightweight — minimal resource usage, runs silently in the background.

How It Works

ByteSip automatically starts when you open a project. It runs three independent timers — one for each reminder type — and displays a balloon notification at the bottom-right of your IDE when it's time for a break. Each notification includes a quick "Done" or "Snooze" action so you stay in control.

Code happy. Stay hydrated. Take breaks. Ship better code.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Water, eye-rest, and movement reminders with fixed intervals.
  • Randomized funny messages for each reminder type.
  • Done and Snooze actions on every notification.
  • Non-blocking balloon notifications.
